zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian ferch Hywel於大約1288年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾利安斯圖姆德時，她的父親Hywel ap Maredudd20歲，母親Mrs. Hywel ap Maredudd15歲。她於大約1325年與Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan )在英國威爾斯尼德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian ferch Hywel于大约1288年出生在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾利安斯圖姆德时，她的父亲Hywel ap Maredudd20岁，母亲Mrs. Hywel ap Maredudd15岁。她于大约1325年与Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan )在英国威尔斯尼德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian ferch Hywel was born about 1288, in Llanystumdwy, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Hywel ap Maredudd, was 20 and her mother, Mrs. Hywel ap Maredudd, was 15. She married Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) about 1325, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian ferch Hywel est née environ 1288, à Llanystumdwy, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hywel ap Maredudd, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Hywel ap Maredudd, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) environ 1325, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian ferch Hywel um 1288 in Llanystumdwy, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hywel ap Maredudd 20 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Hywel ap Maredudd 15. Sie hat um 1325 in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian ferch Hywel è nata il circa 1288 nel Llanystumdwy, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hywel ap Maredudd, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Hywel ap Maredudd, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) circa 1325, nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Hywelが約1288年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアラニーストゥムドウイで生まれた時，父Hywel ap Mareduddは20歳，母Mrs. Hywel ap Mareduddは15歳であった。約1325年にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドでSir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan )と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Hywel(이)가 대략 1288년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 랜이스투드w이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hywel ap Maredudd(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Hywel ap Maredudd(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1325년 영국 웨일스 그w이네드에서 Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan )(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian ferch Hywel родилась около 1288 г. в местности лланистумдви, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hywel ap Maredudd было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Hywel ap Maredudd, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) около 1325 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian ferch Hywel nació aproximadamente 1288, en Llanystumdwy, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Hywel ap Maredudd, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mrs. Hywel ap Maredudd, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir Gruffydd ap  Madog (  Fought At The Battle Of Crecy ) ( Lord Of Llan ) aproximadamente 1325, en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
